assertions.name: ensure-method-extracted
assertions.text: Output contains at least one private method with 'ensure' prefix (e.g., ensureUserExists, ensureBalanceSufficient)

assertions.name: no-inline-runtime-exception
assertions.text: Output does NOT contain 'throw new RuntimeException' inline in the public method

assertions.name: is-has-predicate-extracted
assertions.text: Output contains a private boolean method with 'is' or 'has' prefix (e.g., isUserMissing, hasSufficientBalance)

assertions.name: exception-factory-method
assertions.text: Output contains a private method that returns an exception (factory pattern, not inline throw)

assertions.name: business-exception-used
assertions.text: Output uses BusinessException (not RuntimeException) as the exception type

assertions.name: no-direct-repository
assertions.text: Refactored service does NOT inject PaymentRepository or UserRepository directly — uses Persistence ports

assertions.name: public-method-concise
assertions.text: The main public method (processPayment or equivalent) is short — orchestrates calls to private methods without inline if-else logic
